summary: Frontend-only verification of Phase-1/9 ClaimDetail UX additions: Follow-up row (flag/clear) and AssignmentRow self-assign/unassign buttons. All four UI flows worked end-to-end against the live admin tenant on https://certify-platform-2.preview.emergentagent.com using claim cce9389c-f2e7-42f1-8c17-01b30df7bcfa.
critical_code_review_comments: Spec says self-assign should call POST /api/billing/claims/{id}/assign and unassign should call PATCH /assignment with null. Current frontend (useClaims.updateClaimAssignment) routes BOTH through PATCH /api/billing/claims/{id}/assignment. End-to-end behavior is correct (state mutates, toasts fire, /auth/me id matches new assignee), but if the spec expects the dedicated POST /assign + POST /unassign endpoints for audit-trail granularity, the wiring should be split. Backend also exposes both, so functionally equivalent today.

ClaimWorkflow.jsx is 794 lines — borderline for the >700 line threshold; consider splitting AssignmentRow / FollowupRow / SubmissionsTable / TimelineSection / dialogs into co-located files for readability.
test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (used the 'Use password instead' fallback on the step-up PIN dialog).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing claim cce9389c-f2e7-42f1-8c17-01b30df7bcfa from admin tenant queue. Test left the claim unflagged + unassigned (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: FollowupRow + AssignmentRow self-assign/unassign confirmed working in iteration_63. Step-up PIN dialog fires every time you navigate into /billing/claims or /billing/claims/{id} from a fresh login; use the 'Use password instead' link and re-enter the admin password to dismiss it.
verified_flows: FollowupRow initial state: row visible (data-testid=claim-followup-row), reason input + Flag button present when claim.followup_flag=false.

Click Flag with reason 'E2E test follow-up reason' -> POST /api/billing/claims/{id}/flag-followup succeeds, toast 'Flagged for follow-up' shown, row switches to status mode showing 'Flagged: E2E test follow-up reason' + 'Flagged Wed, Apr 22, 3:33 PM · next action Sat, Apr 25, 3:33 PM' (i.e. next_action_at = now+3d).
Click Clear (data-testid=claim-followup-clear) -> DELETE /api/billing/claims/{id}/flag-followup succeeds, toast 'Follow-up flag cleared', row reverts to reason input + Flag button layout.

AssignmentRow: 'Assign to me' (data-testid=claim-assignee-self-assign) visible when unassigned. Click -> assignee input populated with current user.id 'a7c5ab29-02a8-439b-a2da-f9026471f237' (matches /api/auth/me .id), toast 'Assignment saved'.
Unassign (data-testid=claim-assignee-clear) visible when assigned. Click -> input cleared (''), toast 'Assignment cleared'.
